title: Public/End-User Full Functional + Visual Audit (awesome-list-site)
baseline_note: ENV PIVOT (resume 2026-06-02): Docker is unstartable headlessly (console user=root, no Aqua/GUI session for uid 501; Docker Desktop engine structurally needs its GUI supervisor — raw backend boots libkrun VM then self-cancels because com.docker.build dies with 'unmarshaling start request: unexpected EOF'). The audited compose stack used an INTERNAL postgres volume holding the frozen 1949 baseline; that volume is gone. The SAME built artifact (dist/, node dist/index.js) now runs on host:5001 against Neon. Per user decision (start-docker attempted + structurally blocked), audit proceeds on the equivalent host+Neon app with numeric cases RE-ANCHORED to live server counts (the E19 invariant: UI == /api server count), not the frozen 1949 figures.
method: End-user via Playwright connectOverCDP against headless Chrome on 127.0.0.1:9222, driving the live host app http://localhost:5001 (Neon-backed, same dist/ artifact the container runs). Driver harness: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/.driver.mjs. Every interaction fired, result asserted (DOM + screenshot + live /api data). Visual-inspection checklist on every screenshot. Numeric cases assert UI==live server count. Any FAIL -> root-cause -> fix in source -> rebuild (pnpm build) -> re-test until PASS. Restore seeded data at end.

stories.title: Global Sidebar (AppSidebar) - 14 cases
acceptanceCriteria: All 9 category rows render with counts matching DB badges (91/372/95/183/227/304/263/242/172)
Clicking a category ROW navigates to /category/:slug; clicking the CHEVRON expands without navigating
Expanded category reveals subcategories; expanded subcategory reveals sub-subcategories with counts
Nav items (Home/Submit/Journeys/Advanced/Theme) each navigate to the correct route; active item highlighted
Sidebar collapse/expand toggle works; auto-expand of active branch on route load works
Evidence: screenshots under e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/A-*.png, each READ + visual-inspected

stories.title: Global Header (AppHeader) - 11 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Breadcrumb renders correct trail per route and crumb links navigate
Search button opens SearchDialog; Theme button -> /settings/theme
Logged-out shows Login button -> /login
Logged-in avatar dropdown shows Profile/Bookmarks/Admin(if admin)/Sign Out and each routes correctly; Sign Out logs out
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/B-*.png READ + visual-inspected

stories.title: Search Dialog (command palette) - 10 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Opens via header button and via keyboard shortcut; input focuses
Typing a query (e.g. ffmpeg) filters results live; clicking a result navigates
Arrow-key navigation + Enter select work
No-match query shows empty state; Esc/backdrop closes dialog
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/C-*.png READ + visual-inspected

stories.title: Home (/) - 13 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Hero shows correct N categories (9) and M total resources
9 category cards render with counts; clicking a card -> /category/:slug
Tag filter: single + multi select filters cards and updates counts; clear resets
All 4 sort modes (name-asc/name-desc/count-desc/count-asc) reorder cards correctly
Tag filter hides 0-match categories (displayCount>0)
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/D-*.png READ + visual-inspected (grid spacing/overflow clean)

stories.title: Category page (/category/:slug) - richest filters - 19 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Resources render; count matches sidebar badge AND /api/resources?category server count
Subcategory dropdown populated + filters; selection persists to URL (?subcategory=) across reload
Tag filter + sort dropdown both work; sort persists to URL (?sortBy=) across reload
All 3 view modes (grid/list/compact) render cleanly and persist via localStorage across reload
Resource card click -> /resource/:id; external link opens resource URL
Combined filter (subcat + tag + sort) composes; empty result shows empty state (no crash)
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/E-*.png READ + visual-inspected in all 3 view modes

stories.title: Subcategory page (/subcategory/:slug) - 8 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Resources render for subcategory; tag filter + sort work
Filters persist to URL across reload; card click -> detail
Breadcrumb shows category > subcategory
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/F-*.png READ + visual-inspected

stories.title: Sub-subcategory page (/sub-subcategory/:slug) - 8 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Resources render with correct known counts (HEVC=10, FFMPEG=65, origin-servers=1)
Tag filter + sort work; filters persist to URL across reload
Card click -> detail; breadcrumb trail correct
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/G-*.png READ + visual-inspected

stories.title: Resource Detail (/resource/:id) - 11 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Detail renders title/desc/url/meta correctly; back button returns; external Visit link opens URL
Favorite toggle (logged-in) adds/removes with toast; Bookmark toggle (logged-in) adds/removes with toast
Share button copies URL / share sheet with toast
Related resources (up to 6) render and are clickable; invalid id shows not-found (no crash)
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/H-*.png READ + visual-inspected

stories.title: Advanced (/advanced) 4 sub-tabs - 8 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Explorer / Metrics / Export / AI Recommendations tabs each render via TabsTrigger switching
Explorer internal search/filter functional; Export produces output
AI panel renders (may degrade without AI - degraded is acceptable, crash is not)
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/I-*.png READ + visual-inspected per tab

stories.title: Journeys (/journeys) + JourneyDetail (/journey/:id) - 8 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Journeys list renders (0 seeded -> graceful empty state, not blank); category filter Select works
If journeys exist: card click -> /journey/:id, back button -> /journeys, enroll(logged-out) -> /login
Empty-state messaging clean
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/J-*.png READ + visual-inspected

stories.title: Auth: Login (/login) + Register (/register) - 9 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Login form renders; empty submit shows validation; wrong creds shows error toast with no nav
Valid login (admin@example.com) authenticates and redirects
Register form renders; short password (<8) shows validation; cross-links Login<->Register work
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/K-*.png READ + visual-inspected

stories.title: Submit Resource (/submit) - 7 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Logged-out shows login CTA; logged-in shows full form with category/subcategory/sub-subcategory cascade selects
Empty submit shows validation; valid submit creates a pending resource with success toast
Submitted test resource is DELETED afterward to restore baseline (pending=0)
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/L-*.png READ + visual-inspected

stories.title: Profile (/profile) + Bookmarks (/bookmarks) AuthGuard - 10 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Logged-out /profile and /bookmarks redirect to login (AuthGuard)
Logged-in /profile renders user info + favorites + bookmarks; logout button works
/bookmarks renders list; sort Select reorders; remove bookmark updates list; empty state clean
Any seeded bookmarks/favorites removed afterward to restore baseline (bookmarks=0, favorites=0)
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/M-*.png READ + visual-inspected

stories.title: Theme Settings (/settings/theme) + global dark/light visual - 8 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Mode (light/dark/system), accent color, and font pickers each apply live and persist across reload
Preview buttons render all variants (default/secondary/outline/ghost/destructive)
Dark mode whole-app visual pass: no white-on-dark, contrast >=4.5:1 body text
Light mode whole-app visual pass: glass cards sufficiently opaque
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/N-*.png READ + visual-inspected (both modes)

stories.title: About (/about) + 404 - 4 cases
acceptanceCriteria: /about renders content + external links (correct hrefs)
/nonexistent-route shows NotFound page (no crash) with a way back home
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/O-*.png READ + visual-inspected

stories.title: Responsive viewports - 4 cases
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile 375px: sidebar collapses, hamburger opens nav, Home usable
Mobile category page: filters usable on small screen
Tablet 768px + desktop 1280px: no overflow/clipping
Evidence: e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/P-*.png READ + visual-inspected at each width

stories.title: Final: defects fixed, baselines restored, VERDICT written
acceptanceCriteria: Every defect found during PA-A..PA-P fixed in source, rebuilt, and re-tested to PASS (no deferred FAILs)
DB baselines restored exactly: resources=1949, users=1, pending=0, edits=0, bookmarks=0, favorites=0
e2e-evidence/public-fullrun/VERDICT.md written with per-case PASS/FAIL + evidence citations
evidence-inventory.txt lists all screenshots with byte counts; all screenshots are unique (no stale dupes)
